# NoteDoctor.ai

> AI-powered authorization readiness screening for healthcare providers.

NoteDoctor.ai helps healthcare providers quickly assess prior authorization readiness before submitting requests to payers. The platform uses LLM-based AI agents to surface relevant Medicare coverage policies and commercial payer guidelines in seconds.

## What NoteDoctor.ai Does

- **Authorization Readiness Screening**: Analyzes a clinical procedure or service description against known payer criteria to flag potential authorization issues before submission.
- **Medicare Policy Lookup**: Queries National Coverage Determinations (NCDs) and Local Coverage Determinations (LCDs) to determine Medicare coverage applicability.
- **Cigna Policy Guidance**: Retrieves relevant Cigna commercial insurance policy criteria for procedures and services.
- **HIPAA-Safe Workflow**: No patient PHI is required or stored. Users describe procedures generically; the AI matches against policy language.

## Intended Users

- Healthcare providers (physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants)
- Medical billing and coding specialists
- Prior authorization coordinators
- Revenue cycle management teams

## Key Capabilities

- Real-time conversational AI agent for policy Q&A
- Structured output with coverage criteria summaries
- Document upload for payer-specific policy comparison
- Session-based workflow with no persistent patient data

## Important Limitations

- NoteDoctor.ai provides informational guidance only — not a guarantee of authorization approval.
- All AI-generated guidance should be verified against the payer's official portal prior to submission.
- The platform does not submit authorization requests on behalf of users.

## Technology

NoteDoctor.ai is built on a Next.js web application using LangChain agents, Supabase for authentication, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over payer policy documents.

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://preauthproduction.vercel.app
- Twitter/X: @notedoctorai
